# High Performance Computing

**Summary**: The use of supercomputers or clusters to perform complex calculations quickly.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-edigbue|Edigbue, 2023]] implemented the joint inversion algorithms on an HPC system to optimize computational costs.
